title: Rename device - Rename with no characters [New]
scenario: When renaming a device, clearing all characters disables the Done button, and canceling restores the old name in settings and the rename field.
steps: 1. Navigate to device settings and tap on the device name field.
2. Clear all characters from the device name field.
3. Observe the state of the Done button.
5. Check the displayed device name in settings.
6. Tap on the device name field again.
7. Observe the name shown in the editing field.
expected: The Done button should be disabled when the name field is empty. After tapping Cancel, the old device name should be restored and displayed in settings. Tapping the device name again should still show the old name.
